content_hints.description: Kholinar rises behind its Windblades -- immense stone formations that claw skyward like the fingers of a buried god. The city's bells ring in staggered cascades before each highstorm, their tones carrying across the Alethi countryside for miles.

npcs.name: Gate Sergeant Teleb
npcs.dialogue: Papers, darkeyes. And don't look at the Windblades too long -- new arrivals always get dizzy.

event_triggers: On entry: Highstorm warning bells begin their first cascade

content_hints.description: The Shattered Plains stretch to the horizon -- a vast expanse of stone plateaus separated by chasms of unfathomable depth. Permanent warcamps cling to the western edge, their fires visible at night like a constellation fallen to earth.

npcs.name: Scout Lirin
npcs.dialogue: The plateaus shift after every highstorm. Maps older than a week are kindling.

event_triggers: On entry: Distant drums echo from the eastern plateaus -- Parshendi war rhythms

content_hints.description: Urithiru. The tower city of the Knights Radiant, thought lost for millennia, rises through the clouds above the peaks. Its tiers are carved from a single impossible mountain of stone, every surface inscribed with glyphs that once glowed with Stormlight.

npcs.name: Navani Kholin
npcs.dialogue: The tower has secrets we have barely begun to understand. Rooms that open to no key. Fabrials that hum at frequencies we cannot hear.

event_triggers: On entry: The Stormfather's voice rumbles like distant thunder, acknowledging your arrival

content_hints.description: The chasms beneath the Shattered Plains are a world unto themselves -- a labyrinth of dripping stone and ancient bones. Moss glows faintly where water trickles, and the skeletons of fallen chasmfiends arch overhead like the ribs of cathedrals.
event_triggers: On entry: Water rushes somewhere below -- a highstorm's runoff, hours old

content_hints.description: The Stormlands -- open Alethi countryside where crem-crusted rockbuds dot the stone ground and lavis polyps cling to every sheltered surface. The sky darkens in the east, and the air tastes of ozone. A highstorm approaches.

npcs.name: Farmer Hesina
npcs.dialogue: Best get inside, travelers. That wall of cloud means you have maybe an hour. I can sell you storm provisions, but not time.

event_triggers: On entry: Rockbuds retract their vines and seal shut -- the land itself prepares
